nodes.name: Silvered antbird
nodes.summary: Silvered antbird（Silvered antbird，学名 Sclateria naevia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The silvered antbird (Sclateria naevia) is a passerine bird in the subfamily Thamnophilinae of the family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds." It is found in Trinidad and every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay

links.evidence: toddi: south-central Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon from the Rio Madeira and Teles Pires to the Rio Tocantins The silvered antbird inhabits the floor and understorey of tropical evergreen forest, primarily várzea and igapó, along streams, terra firme and in swampy areas within the forest
